personal_info.name: Alapati Manikanta
personal_info.title: Computer Science Student & Application Developer
personal_info.bio: I'm a passionate innovator and technology researcher dedicated to creating AI solutions that make a meaningful impact on human lives. With experience developing Python-based AI systems and Android applications, my current focus has evolved toward a new frontier: integrating generative AI into intelligent monitoring systems.

research_focus.title: Emotional Intelligence in AI
research_focus.description: Developing AI that understands and responds to human emotional states through behavioral analysis, creating emotionally aware systems.

research_focus.title: Health & Wellness Interventions
research_focus.description: Researching AI systems that monitor daily activities and predict health issues before they become serious through behavioral analytics.

research_focus.title: Financial Personal Advisory
research_focus.description: Developing AI that can analyze spending patterns, predict financial stress, and provide personalized advice for financial wellness.

research_focus.title: Digital Wellness
research_focus.description: Detecting unhealthy overconsumption patterns and recommending interventions to improve mental health.

timeline.title: CoB-FA (Cognitive Behavioral Financial Advisor)
timeline.description: An Android personal finance app combining tracking, budgeting, and AI behavioral insights for mindful spending.

timeline.title: STRIVE Accident Detection System
timeline.description: Developed an AI-powered system using YOLOv9 for real-time fire and vehicle accident detection.

timeline.title: Samarpan Mobile App
timeline.description: Created an Android application with Firebase integration focusing on modern UI design principles.

projects.name: CoB-FA
projects.description: Cognitive Behavioral Financial Advisor is an Android personal finance application combining expense tracking, budgeting, analytics, and AI-powered behavioral insights. Uses a local-first privacy approach.

projects.name: STRIVE - Accident Detection System
projects.description: AI-powered accident detection system using YOLOv9 to detect fires and vehicle accidents, automatically sending SMS alerts to emergency services.

projects.name: Samarpan - Mobile App
projects.description: Android application developed with XML layouts and modern UI design principles. Features responsive UI and Firebase integration.

projects.name: Next-Gen Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern, interactive portfolio dynamically constructed from JSON data, featuring custom JS renderers, and bento-box layouts.
